message:
feat(format): long/pretty output modes with box-drawing tree connectors

Add format_issue_long_with() and format_issue_pretty_with() functions
with shared issue_detail_lines() helper. The --pretty flag uses Unicode
box-drawing tree connectors, and --long shows indented detail lines.

Add e2e tests with concrete assertions for long/pretty formats, plus a
test verifying that default and pretty outputs differ.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
